sqlMap.select: select * from PolicyCoverage where AggregateDeductible = #AggregateDeductible# and OccuranceDeductible = #OccuranceDeductible# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and SOISequence = #SOISequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AggregateLimit = #AggregateLimit# and OccuranceLimit = #OccuranceLimit# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into PolicyCoverage(TransactionSequence, PolicyKey Premium LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp RetroActiveDate IsClaimOptionType IsClaimExpensesType TotalCovModifierPercentage TotalCoverageTaxAmount InitialCovPremium Exposure RiskState RiskZip ERPDate Commission AttachmentPoint PrimaryAccess ClassCode IsDollarDefense ManualPremium IsManualPremium CreatedDate CreatedBy SOISequence AggregateDeductible OccuranceDeductible CoverageKey AggregateLimit OccuranceLimit MarketableProductKey ) values (#TransactionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #Premium# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #RetroActiveDate# #IsClaimOptionType# #IsClaimExpensesType# #TotalCovModifierPercentage# #TotalCoverageTaxAmount# #InitialCovPremium# #Exposure# #RiskState# #RiskZip# #ERPDate# #Commission# #AttachmentPoint# #PrimaryAccess# #ClassCode# #IsDollarDefense# #ManualPremium# #IsManualPremium# #CreatedDate# #CreatedBy# #SOISequence# #AggregateDeductible# #OccuranceDeductible# #CoverageKey# #AggregateLimit# #OccuranceLimit# #MarketableProductKey# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('PolicyCoverage') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select CoverageSequence, Premium, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, RetroActiveDate, IsClaimOptionType, IsClaimExpensesType, TotalCovModifierPercentage, TotalCoverageTaxAmount, InitialCovPremium, Exposure, RiskState, RiskZip, ERPDate, Commission, AttachmentPoint, PrimaryAccess, ClassCode, IsDollarDefense, ManualPremium, IsManualPremium, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, TransactionSequence, SOISequence, AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, CoverageKey, AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, PolicyKey, MarketableProductKey from PolicyCoverage where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update PolicyCoverage set
Premium = #Premium# Premium = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null RetroActiveDate = #RetroActiveDate# RetroActiveDate = null IsClaimOptionType = #IsClaimOptionType# IsClaimOptionType = null IsClaimExpensesType = #IsClaimExpensesType# IsClaimExpensesType = null TotalCovModifierPercentage = #TotalCovModifierPercentage# TotalCovModifierPercentage = null TotalCoverageTaxAmount = #TotalCoverageTaxAmount# TotalCoverageTaxAmount = null InitialCovPremium = #InitialCovPremium# InitialCovPremium = null Exposure = #Exposure# Exposure = null RiskState = #RiskState# RiskState = null RiskZip = #RiskZip# RiskZip = null ERPDate = #ERPDate# ERPDate = null Commission = #Commission# Commission = null AttachmentPoint = #AttachmentPoint# AttachmentPoint = null PrimaryAccess = #PrimaryAccess# PrimaryAccess = null ClassCode = #ClassCode# ClassCode = null IsDollarDefense = #IsDollarDefense# IsDollarDefense = null ManualPremium = #ManualPremium# ManualPremium = null IsManualPremium = #IsManualPremium# IsManualPremium = null CreatedDate = #CreatedDate# CreatedDate = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null SOISequence = #SOISequence# SOISequence = null AggregateDeductible = #AggregateDeductible# AggregateDeductible = null OccuranceDeductible = #OccuranceDeductible# OccuranceDeductible = null CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# CoverageKey = null AggregateLimit = #AggregateLimit# AggregateLimit = null OccuranceLimit = #OccuranceLimit# OccuranceLimit = null MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey# MarketableProductKey = null
where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from PolicyCoverage where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

delete from PolicyCoverage where AggregateDeductible = #AggregateDeductible# and OccuranceDeductible = #OccuranceDeductible# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and SOISequence = #SOISequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AggregateLimit = #AggregateLimit# and OccuranceLimit = #OccuranceLimit# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
sqlMap.select: select CoverageSequence, Premium, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, RetroActiveDate, IsClaimOptionType, IsClaimExpensesType, TotalCovModifierPercentage, TotalCoverageTaxAmount, InitialCovPremium, Exposure, RiskState, RiskZip, ERPDate, Commission, AttachmentPoint, PrimaryAccess, ClassCode, IsDollarDefense, ManualPremium, IsManualPremium, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, TransactionSequence, SOISequence, AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, CoverageKey, AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, PolicyKey, MarketableProductKey from PolicyCoverage where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select CoverageSequence, TransactionSequence, PolicyKey, Premium, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, RetroActiveDate, IsClaimOptionType, IsClaimExpensesType, TotalCovModifierPercentage, TotalCoverageTaxAmount, InitialCovPremium, Exposure, RiskState, RiskZip, ERPDate, Commission, AttachmentPoint, PrimaryAccess, ClassCode, IsDollarDefense, ManualPremium, IsManualPremium, CreatedDate, CreatedBy from PolicyCoverage where AggregateDeductible = #AggregateDeductible# and OccuranceDeductible = #OccuranceDeductible# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and SOISequence = #SOISequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AggregateLimit = #AggregateLimit# and OccuranceLimit = #OccuranceLimit# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey# and MarketableProductKey = #MarketableProductKey#
